_comment: Runtime configuration for the TAR · Hiring Analytics dashboard. dashboard.js fetches this file on init() and overrides the embedded defaults. Safe to edit by hand — keep valid JSON.
_manualAllocations_help: Each key is an agent name. Value is a map of { role -> [stages this agent handles for that role] }. Stage values are matched case-insensitively against the dashboard's STAGE_FRIENDLY table: 'Application Screening', 'Pipeline Screening', 'HRS', 'CFA'.
